tasks.name: **Task Name**: Enable cryptographically signed JFR recordings for audit log metadata per CBIRC 2022-8 §4
tasks.description: Configure Spring Boot 3.2 (Java 17) to emit JFR recordings with SHA-256+RSA-2048 signatures embedded in recording metadata, ensuring tamper-evident audit trails for all transactional and authorization events.
tasks.inputs_outputs: Signed `.jfr` files in `/var/log/jfr/` with `signature: <base64>` in JFR header; unit test verifying signature validity

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Build granular, revocable, purpose-limited consent scopes using Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server
tasks.description: Extend Spring Security to enforce dynamic, user-granted consent scopes (e.g., `card:balance:read`, `transaction:history:export`) with audit logging of grant/revocation, expiry, and PIPL-required purpose justification.
tasks.inputs_outputs: Working REST API + integration tests; sample Postman collection; consent audit log schema for Cassandra

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Create immutable, TTL-governed Cassandra tables for hotlist records and consent audits per CBIRC 2020-12 §3
tasks.description: Define CQL schema for `hotlist_records` (card PAN + reason + timestamp) and `consent_audit_log` with `USING TTL = 155520000` (5 years), `default_time_to_live = 0`, and `compaction = {'class': 'TimeWindowCompactionStrategy'}`. Enforce immutability via application-layer write-only DAO.
tasks.inputs_outputs: Executed CQL DDL; `HotlistDao` interface + impl; Liquibase test harness validating TTL + immutability

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Deploy and configure Debezium-based Kafka sink to replicate hotlist updates from PostgreSQL 15 → Cassandra 5
tasks.description: Implement CDC pipeline: PostgreSQL `hotlist_events` table → Kafka topic `hotlist.updates` → Cassandra `hotlist_records`. Use Kafka Connect with `cassandra-sink-connector` v2.5.0, configured for idempotent writes and tombstone handling.
tasks.inputs_outputs: Running Kafka Connect cluster; validated sync pipeline; latency report (JMeter script included)

tasks.name: **Task Name**: Create and optimize `hotlist_events` table in PostgreSQL 15 for low-latency lookups (<5s @ 10B+ rows) per CBIRC 2020-12
tasks.description: Design partitioned, indexed table for PAN-based hotlist queries: range-partition by `created_at`, BRIN index on `pan_hash`, GIN index on `reason_codes`, and covering index for `SELECT status WHERE pan_hash = ? AND created_at > ?`.
